primary_text: This band holds a meteorite older than Earth itself. Forged from a rock that traveled the cosmos. Now it grounds a promise. A story written in the stars, built in Texas.
description: Your story starts with a material that has its own. Free engraving included.
needs_new_video_concept: Close-up shot of a meteorite inlay ring, with text overlay about its age and origin.

primary_text: This ring began as a whiskey barrel. Aged oak, steeped in character and history. We craft that story into a band with weight and warmth. A legacy you can wear.
description: Real materials with real history. Texas crafted since 2011.
needs_new_video_concept: Video showing the transformation from barrel wood to polished ring inlay.

primary_text: Wear a piece of deep time. Genuine dinosaur bone, set against rugged tungsten. A conversation piece for a lifetime. For the man whose bond is built to last.
description: A story millions of years in the making. Free custom engraving.

primary_text: Koa wood, harvested from Hawaiian forests. Each grain tells a story of sun and salt air. We inlay it here in Texas. A band with heritage in its core.
description: Character rich materials. Worldwide delivered.

hook: Feel the solid weight of it.
primary_text: The cool, substantial weight of tungsten. It sits with a confident presence on your hand. A polished finish that catches the light, not scratches. Comfort fit for every day.
description: Real quality you can feel. Scratch resistant and built to last.

primary_text: Engineered for a life lived with your hands. The smooth, rounded interior glides on and off. It feels like it's always been there. A ring you forget to take off.
description: Comfort fit designed in Texas. Lifetime warranty included.

hook: Light plays on the hammered finish.
primary_text: A textured, hammered center catches light differently with every move. It feels rugged under your thumb. This is tactile character. Built for the man who wears something real.
description: Real Texas craft. Real people behind every band.

hook: The beveled edge. A clean line.
primary_text: Precision bevels create sharp, clean lines. It looks modern and intentional. The polished black tungsten has a deep, liquid sheen. The kind of ring people ask about.
description: From the heart of Texas. Comfort fit and scratch resistant.

primary_text: The flag isn't just a symbol. It's a commitment. Crafted with precision in Texas, worn with pride anywhere. This is more than a ring. It's a statement.
description: American made. Texas crafted. Worldwide delivered.

hook: Built in Texas. Built to last.
primary_text: We don't outsource our integrity. Every band is crafted by real people right here in Texas. That's the promise in the weight. American quality through and through.
description: Real quality. Real people. Real Texas craft.
needs_new_video_concept: Shot of a craftsman's hands in a Texas workshop, finishing a ring.

primary_text: From our workshop to your hand. We believe in making things that last, the American way. Durable materials, honest craftsmanship. A band with backbone.
description: Built In Texas Since 2011. Lifetime warranty included.

hook: For the man who values origin.
primary_text: You know where your tools are made. Your truck. Your whiskey. Your ring should be no different. Crafted with American steel and Texas grit.
description: From the heart of Texas. Worldwide delivered.

hook: A lifetime guarantee, not a discount.
primary_text: We don't do discounts. We build value in. Free custom engraving. A lifetime warranty. Scratch resistant comfort fit. That's the real deal. Pay over time with Affirm available.
description: Real value is built in, not marked down.

primary_text: Make it undeniably yours. We include free custom engraving on every single order. Along with a lifetime warranty. This is how we build rings. And trust.
description: Free engraving. Lifetime warranty. Texas crafted.
needs_new_video_concept: Close-up of an engraving machine etching initials inside a ring band.

primary_text: A ring should feel like part of you. Our comfort fit design does. Paired with a lifetime warranty, it's a promise that doesn't fade. Pay over time with Affirm available.
description: Built for a lifetime of wear. Not just for the day.

hook: The ring, the warranty, the engraving.
primary_text: This is the stack. A band built with character. Free engraving to make it yours. A lifetime warranty to keep it that way. Real value is in the making.
description: Built In Texas Since 2011. Pay over time with Affirm.

hook: For the groom who refuses boring.
primary_text: Your style isn't generic. Your ring shouldn't be either. Choose character over conformity. A band with a story, built for the man who wears something real.
description: Rings with stories built in. Texas crafted.
needs_new_video_concept: Quick cuts of an active, stylish man in various settings (workshop, outdoors) glancing at his unique ring.

primary_text: The first ring marked the promise. This one marks the journey. Durable, character rich, and crafted with intention. For the chapters you've written together.
description: Real quality for a real life. Free engraving included.

hook: For the man with calloused hands.
primary_text: You build things. Fix things. Your ring should match that spirit. Scratch resistant, solid, and built to work. A band that earns its patina.
description: Built for a life of doing. Comfort fit. Lifetime warranty.

primary_text: Skip the shiny, forgettable band. Choose one with depth. With materials that have a past. A ring that says you considered it. The kind people ask about.
description: Texas crafted, character rich rings. Worldwide delivered.
